name: Mythal Touched
description: Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20. When a spell attack hits you or you fail a saving throw against a spell, you can use a reaction to roll on the Mythal-Touched Magic table to create a magical effect. Potential effects include dealing force damage to nearby creatures, creating a telepathic link, reversing gravity, stunning the caster, gaining a +2 AC bonus, or causing the spell to dissipate entirely. You can use this benefit a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.
